20.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
20.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

21.gl: properly, to hedge about (as with thorns), i.e. guard; generally, to protect, attend to, etc.

21.kj: body, bone, [idiom] life, (self-) same, strength, [idiom] very.

22.gl: to be guilty; by implication to be punished or perish

22.gl: morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person
22.kj: [phrase] condemned, guilty, ungodly, wicked (man), that did wrong.
